title: Thyrocare Technologies launches diagnostic laboratory in Gwalior
summary: New facility expands presence in Madhya Pradesh with three laboratories across the state
thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
contentHtml:
New facility expands presence in Madhya Pradesh with three laboratories across the state

Thyrocare Technologies has launched its first diagnostic laboratory in Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, in association with Excellence Diagnostics. The facility was inaugurated by Piyush Singh,Vice President, Thyrocare.

With this launch, Thyrocare operates three laboratories in Madhya Pradesh, including existing facilities in Bhopal and Indore.

The laboratory is equipped with testing infrastructure and is supported by trained professionals. It is designed to cater to routine and specialised testing requirements, supporting preventive and ongoing healthcare needs.

The expansion is aligned with the company’s focus on strengthening its network and addressing demand for diagnostic services in emerging markets. The Gwalior facility expands Thyrocare’s presence in central India.

Rahul Guha, MD and CEO, Thyrocare, said, “At Thyrocare, our focus is on making high-quality and reliable diagnostic services accessible to every Indian household. The launch of our new facility reflects our continued efforts to expand our presence while addressing diagnostic gaps through a technology-led and patient-focused approach.”

Rajdeep Panwar,  Chief Commercial Officer, Thyrocare, said, “Our focus in markets like Gwalior is on improving last-mile access and ensuring that both patients and healthcare partners have access to consistent and timely diagnostic services. This facility allows us to strengthen our reach in the region while maintaining the quality and turnaround standards that Thyrocare is known for.”

With this launch, Thyrocare continues to expand its presence in Madhya Pradesh, focusing on access to diagnostic services across cities beyond metro markets. The company will continue to expand its network and bring healthcare services closer to patients.
